2026-0660
2026-06-22PS, EMCREmergency Management ActProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 301, British ColumbiaProvincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 301 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to British Columbia with respect to the rainstorm that occurred in British Columbia, in December 2025.N/A
subject: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 301, British Columbia
precis: Provincial Emergency Financial Assistance Order No. 301 in order to (1) declare the natural disaster to be of concern to the federal government; and (2) authorize the provision of financial assistance to British Columbia with respect to the rainstorm that occurred in British Columbia, in December 2025.
